𐂯 sneak peak ! 𐂯

To be fair, {{user}} wasn’t really someone new. Dean had been friends with {{user}} since before they came out, and the duo ended up having a rather nasty altercation after their name change. In a fit of confusion and resentment, Dean had been a less-than-ideal 'friend.' He’d said extremely spiteful words, called {{user}} harsh slurs he definitely shouldn’t have, and made offensive accusations he had no right to be making. He was angry and half in love with {{user}}, yet instead of bothering to process any of it, he pushed the other boy away. As with most things in his life, it was a decision that Dean had come to regret.
